channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
RE-GE那須ほほみ、念願の写真集を発表
「挑戦をする心を忘れたくないんです」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/682098?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

・憧れのタイで撮影「ここに住みたい！🇹🇭」
・表紙には想定外の自然体カットが
・RE-GEとして迎える初めての夏☀️

#那須ほほみ #リージェ

・表紙には想定外の自然体カットが
・RE-GEとして迎える初めての夏☀️

item.title: Nutrition advocates and public health experts are mystified …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Nutrition advocates and public health experts are mystified by the decision to eliminate SNAP-Ed, given the Trump administration's embrace of the Make America Healthy Again agenda. n.pr/4hrgD5V
item.content:encoded: Nutrition advocates and public health experts are mystified by the decision to eliminate SNAP-Ed, given the Trump administration's embrace of the Make America Healthy Again agenda. n.pr/4hrgD5V

item.title: The New York Times will argue in court Thursday that the Whi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The New York Times will argue in court Thursday that the White House is abusing the justice system to intimidate reporters over a story that angered President Trump. n.pr/44OpRlo
item.content:encoded: The New York Times will argue in court Thursday that the White House is abusing the justice system to intimidate reporters over a story that angered President Trump. n.pr/44OpRlo

item.title: The recent fatal shootings by ICE officers in Texas and Main…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The recent fatal shootings by ICE officers in Texas and Maine come at a time when the federal agency has hired a huge number of officers quickly. Some law enforcement experts worry that this kind of a hiring spree can lead police agencies to cut corners in vetting new hires. n.pr/4pvWRbu
item.content:encoded: The recent fatal shootings by ICE officers in Texas and Maine come at a time when the federal agency has hired a huge number of officers quickly. Some law enforcement experts worry that this kind of a hiring spree can lead police agencies to cut corners in vetting new hires. n.pr/4pvWRbu

item.title: The husband-wife duo, and their tight band, deliver fresh, s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The husband-wife duo, and their tight band, deliver fresh, soul-inflected songs of uncommon power. n.pr/4fQ4V3G
item.content:encoded: The husband-wife duo, and their tight band, deliver fresh, soul-inflected songs of uncommon power. n.pr/4fQ4V3G

item.title: 【特集】「福岡ミュージックマンス」開催記念企画 小山田壮平、愛すべきホームタウン福岡を語る 「福岡の人は“表現す…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【特集】「福岡ミュージックマンス」開催記念企画

小山田壮平、愛すべきホームタウン福岡を語る
「福岡の人は“表現する”ということに対する壁が薄いんじゃないかな」
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/fukuokamusicmonth

「福岡」をテーマに選曲したプレイリストも

#小山田壮平 #福岡ミュージックマンス
item.content:encoded:
【特集】「福岡ミュージックマンス」開催記念企画

小山田壮平、愛すべきホームタウン福岡を語る
「福岡の人は“表現する”ということに対する壁が薄いんじゃないかな」
https://natalie.mu/music/pp/fukuokamusicmonth

「福岡」をテーマに選曲したプレイリストも

#小山田壮平 #福岡ミュージックマンス

item.title: Tyra Banks is celebrating the “Modelland” revival with new f…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Tyra Banks is celebrating the “Modelland” revival with new flavors at her Sydney ice cream shops, SMiZE & DREAM.

Happy anniversary to all those who celebrate.

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...
item.content:encoded:
Tyra Banks is celebrating the “Modelland” revival with new flavors at her Sydney ice cream shops, SMiZE & DREAM.

Happy anniversary to all those who celebrate.

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...

item.title: The internet recently discovered “Modelland,” a song Tyra Ba…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
The internet recently discovered “Modelland,” a song Tyra Banks unveiled 15 years ago today. Newfound fascination with the theme to her 576-page fantasy novel has propelled its “‘Harry Potter’ meets ‘America’s Next Top Model’” universe into the public consciousness…

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...
item.content:encoded:
The internet recently discovered “Modelland,” a song Tyra Banks unveiled 15 years ago today. Newfound fascination with the theme to her 576-page fantasy novel has propelled its “‘Harry Potter’ meets ‘America’s Next Top Model’” universe into the public consciousness…

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...

item.title: Republicans passed a more than $1-trillion Pentagon bill alo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Republicans passed a more than $1-trillion Pentagon bill alongside a budget blueprint that would let them bypass Democrats and unlock other funds for the Iran war and Trump's election overhaul bill. n.pr/4pxoW2e
item.content:encoded: Republicans passed a more than $1-trillion Pentagon bill alongside a budget blueprint that would let them bypass Democrats and unlock other funds for the Iran war and Trump's election overhaul bill. n.pr/4pxoW2e

item.title: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nu…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nuclear reactors and fuel to Saudi Arabia. It's expected to last decades and be worth billions of dollars. n.pr/4bHQPPp
item.content:encoded: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nuclear reactors and fuel to Saudi Arabia. It's expected to last decades and be worth billions of dollars. n.pr/4bHQPPp
